attempts.test_code:
import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_item_exactly_fills_capacity():
    # Item with weight==capacity must be included; buggy code uses weight < j
    # so it skips the item when weight == j, giving 5 instead of 10.
    result = knapsack(3, [(3, 10), (1, 5)])
    assert result == 10, f"Expected 10 (item weight==capacity should be valid), got {result}"
